# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS: Record<string, boolean>;
};

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    newDashboard: false,
    betaAccess: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
  },
};

async function loadConfig(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const edgeConfigConnection = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnection) {
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags] = await Promise.all([
    get<string>('API_KEY').catch(() => null),
    get<string>('DB_URL').catch(() => null),
    get<Record<string, boolean>>('FEATURE_FLAGS').catch(() => null),
  ]);

  return {
    API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
    DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
    FEATURE_FLAGS: {
      ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS,
      ...(featureFlags ?? {}),
    },
  };
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const config = await loadConfig();
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      ok: true,
      region: (globalThis as any).EdgeRuntime ? 'edge' : 'unknown',
      path: url.pathname,
      config,
      edgeConfigConnected: Boolean(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG),
    }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
        'cache-control': 'no-store',
      },
    }
  );
}
